title: Kai Trump's trademark for clothing brand challenged by UK company
shortDescription: Kai Trump, the president's eldest granddaughter, had moved to trademark her name. A UK-based clothing brand 'KAI' argues it was selling goods first.

title: Trump's patience with John Thune is 'running out' over SAVE Act
shortDescription: White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said President Donald Trump's "patience is running out" as the GOP Senate leader struggles to pass the SAVE Act.

title: Anthony Fauci to testify about COVID-19 pandemic at Senate hearing
shortDescription: Anthony Fauci, who led the government's response to COVID-19, will testify at a Senate hearing after Sen. Rand Paul accused him of destroying records.

title: Trump jabs at Jon Ossoff. Today he hosts the Dodgers. Watch Trump news
shortDescription: President Donald Trump took aim at Jon Ossoff in Georgia. He announced a nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia. He will host the Dodgers today.

title: AOC responds as polls rank her high among Democrats for 2028
shortDescription: This week, a battleground state poll showed her in the lead amongst Democrat voters for the 2028 primary. Here's what to know.

title: Trump admin turnover so far includes 27 officials compared to Biden's 1
shortDescription: A report by the Partnership for Public Service finds Trump's Senate-confirmed official turnover is 6x higher than the average of recent presidents.

title: Jackson gains Trump endorsement during GA speech. What Jackson said
shortDescription: President Trump endorsed Rick Jackson for Georgia governor during an appearance at an Atlanta area high school. Trump previously endorsed Burt Jones.

title: SAVE America Act fight heats up as Republicans try new ways to pass it
shortDescription: Republicans are reviving the SAVE Act through spending bills and funding plans, adding voter ID measures. Here's the latest Senate vote update.

title: Can LA ban the N-word at meetings? First Amendment fight grows
shortDescription: The Los Angeles City council says "inherently harmful" words can be banned from meetings. Two free-speech groups disagree.

title: Trump defends Iran war after lawmakers split on supporting conflict
shortDescription: The House of Representatives voted to end the war in Iran, but the Senate backed the president.

title: 23 governors sign Trump's cost pledge for data centers, backbone of AI
shortDescription: Twenty-three Republican governors have signed President Trump's pledge for data centers as the sprawling IT facilities face increasing resistance.

title: Young voters may hold the key to Maine's Senate battle
shortDescription: Amid Democrats' scramble to replace Graham Platner in Maine's Senate race, new polling suggests voters under age 35 remain a decisive constituency.

title: States audit voter systems after NJ noncitizen registration exposed
shortDescription: More than half of U.S. states use the same vendor that New Jersey blamed for a 'serious software error' that registered 6,600 noncitizens to vote.

title: Democrats slam Social Security boss over 'politicized' email praising Trump
shortDescription: Senate Democrats condemn Social Security Administration commissioner for “politicized” email to benefits recipients

title: Democrats demand answers over social security email
shortDescription: These Senate Democrats are criticizing a Social Security Administration email sent to retirees, arguing it contained misleading statements and improperly politicized agency communications.

title: Government shutdown odds rise as Congress heads into recess
shortDescription: The government has until Sept. 30 to pass a funding bill and avoid a shutdown. There's just one problem with that timeline – August recess.

title: Trump brings ‘Trump Accounts’ campaign to Georgia high school
shortDescription: President Donald Trump spoke in Georgia to promote the "Trump Accounts" tax-advantaged investment program, outlining the initiative during an event at Wheeler High School.
